error_signature: event created at the wrong time
title: Outlook event created with incorrect time zone
symptom: Events created in Outlook appear one hour later than intended. The agent confirms the correct time, but Outlook shows a discrepancy.
applies_when: Agent configured with a specific time zone
not_this_if: Events are created correctly in other time zones
No time zone is specified in the agent settings
root_cause: The discrepancy in event timing is likely due to the n8n server's time zone settings being incorrect, such as being set to UTC instead of the desired local time zone. This causes events to be created with an offset from the intended time.
fix_steps: Access the n8n workflow settings by clicking the top right 3 dots
Set the time zone to the correct value, such as Europe/Paris
Check the server's environment variables to ensure the time zone is also set correctly
agent_instruction: Update the time zone in both the workflow settings and the server environment variables to ensure events are created at the correct time.
